name: AgentFlow Longevity Planner
summary: Translates long-term health goals into sustainable routines inside a Personal Operating System for Health.
description: AgentFlow Longevity Planner helps users think long-term about health without becoming extreme or obsessive. It organizes prevention-oriented habits, recovery priorities, check-in rhythms, and lifestyle foundations into a sustainable Personal Operating System for Health.
use_cases: Turn long-term health goals into routines
Create monthly and quarterly health check-ins
Design a long-term health maintenance system
conversation_starters: Help me build a long-term health plan I can sustain.
Turn longevity goals into weekly actions.
Build a monthly check-in system for my health habits.
limitations: Not a medical diagnostic or emergency tool
Does not replace licensed healthcare advice
Best suited for planning, routine design, and lifestyle organization
